detail.description: Alan Roden grounds out, pitcher José Soriano to first baseman Nolan Schanuel.
Alan Roden lines out to center fielder Josh Lowe.
Alan Roden singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jo Adell. Victor Caratini scores.
Alan Roden grounds out, shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Victor Caratini to 2nd.
Alan Roden grounds out, second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Nolan Schanuel.
Alan Roden flies out to left fielder Wade Meckler.
Alan Roden grounds out, third baseman Gabriel Arias to first baseman Kyle Manzardo.
Alan Roden singles on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Kahlil Watson. Royce Lewis scores. Alex Jackson to 3rd. Luke Keaschall to 2nd.
Alan Roden flies out to left fielder Steven Kwan.
Alan Roden singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Kahlil Watson. Josh Bell scores. Royce Lewis to 3rd.
Alan Roden lines out to left fielder David Fry.
Alan Roden grounds out, first baseman Michael Busch to pitcher Colin Rea.
